steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The decisive clue is in the third bullet: “To document this period, Wilkerson narrates the personal journeys of Ida Mae Gladney and Robert Pershing Foster, among others.” This directly describes the METHOD by which Wilkerson documents the Great Migration — through personal narratives of individuals.

steps.title: Match the method to the answer
steps.content:
Choice B states that Wilkerson “chronicles the complex history of the Great Migration in such riveting, personal detail by narrating the journeys of individuals, such as Ida Mae Gladney and Robert Pershing Foster.” This directly shows the method: she documents the Great Migration by narrating individual personal journeys.

The other three choices fail to emphasize this documentation method, focusing instead on secondary details, background information, or awards.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
